## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature
- [ ] Theming / appearance
- [ ] Install script / packages
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are in the **repo** (dotfiles/phases/lib), not just my live `~/.config`
- [ ] `bash install.sh --dry-run` still looks correct (if I touched the installer)
- [ ] Lua config still parses: `.claude/skills/run-hypr-shell/driver.sh check` (if I touched `hyprland.lua`)
- [ ] Shell still loads with no QML errors (if I touched `dotfiles/quickshell/`)
- [ ] Followed the surrounding code style; commits are scoped and descriptive
